REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP DOING BUSINESS AS THE GATEWAY HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL

UD COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-17-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-18-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN 501. ERIC MILLIKEN SPECIALLY APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL, ROBERT KAYVON AND REQUESTS A ONE DAY CONTINUANCE. COURT GRANTS THE ORAL REQUEST. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED (D501)

UD COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-18-2012 CONTINUED TO UD COURT TRIAL ON SEP-24-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN 501. COUNSELS AND LITIGANTS CONFER IN THE HALLWAY FOR SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. COUNSELS ADVISE THE MATTER HAS NOT SETTLED, HOWEVER SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS WILL CONTINUE AND COUNSELS ANTICIPATE BEING ABLE TO RESOLVE THE MATTER. REQUEST TO BE PLACED ON THE MONDAY TRIAL CALENDAR IS GRANTED. MATTER CONTINUED TO SEP-24-2012 AT 9:00 AM. NOTICE WAIVED. (501)

UD COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-24-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN 501, FOR SETTLEMENT PROTECTED DATE. COUNSEL FOR BOTH PARTIES PRESENT AND IN OPEN COURT. NOTICE WAIVED. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED (D501)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-01-2012 - CASE IS DISMISSED.
